css.fallback_for_css_zoom: @media only screen and (min-device-width: 320px) and (max-device-width: 980px), (min-device-width: 1024px) and (max-device-width: 1024px) and (min-device-height: 1366px) and (max-device-height: 1366px) and (min-width: 320px) and (max-width: 980px) { #tocContainer { -moz-transform: initial; } }
